scripts.test: bun run test:vitest && bun run test:deno
scripts.build:check: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/sdk/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/composite-actions/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/typed-actions/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/job-helpers/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/yaml-import/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.check: bun run format && bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build:check && bun run verify:docs && bun run test
